title: Security:  UAF in device_del
description_snippet:
The hci_error_reset and hci_rx_work are two worker threads, so there is a possibility of race conditions. hci_error_reset will eventually call device_del, hci_rx_work will eventually call device_add, so there is a race condition vulnerability between [0] and [1],[2]  
  
  
https://source.chromium.o
